name: mabl
description: Independent verification for agentic development. Create, run, and debug mabl end-to-end tests directly from your coding agent.

interface.shortDescription: Create, run, and debug mabl end-to-end tests from your coding agent.
interface.longDescription: Independent verification for agentic development. Use mabl to author browser and API tests, run them, and debug failures — reproducing a failed run locally and stepping through it in a real browser — without leaving your terminal.
defaultPrompt: Create a mabl end-to-end test for a flow in my app
A mabl test run failed — find out why and fix it
